sources.title: Cisco Reports Third Quarter Earnings — IR
sources.snippet: Record $15.8B revenue; product orders +35%; FY26 AI hyperscaler orders raised to $9B.

sources.title: Cisco Stock Hits Record High on AI Orders — IBD
sources.snippet: Q3 beat; AI network orders $5.3B YTD; Q4 revenue guide $16.8B above Street.

sources.title: Silicon One Wins and $9B AI Orders — TIKR
sources.snippet: Five hyperscaler design wins; Silicon One P200 scale-across; Cloud Control at Cisco Live.

sources.title: r/stocks CSCO search — AI networking vs valuation threads
sources.snippet: Retail mix: legacy compounder bids vs posts on extended chart after earnings rip.

sources.title: Cisco 8-K May 13 2026 — SEC
sources.snippet: Restructuring up to $1B pre-tax; ~$450M charges in FQ4 2026 for workforce realignment toward AI.
